creator: leres@freebsd.org
text:
> ===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for bro-2.2
> Ignoring previously applied (or reversed) patch.
> 1 out of 1 hunks ignored--saving rejects to src/Expr.cc.rej
> => Patch patch-src-Expr.cc failed to apply cleanly.
> => Patch(es) patch-CMakeLists.txt patch-aux-broctl-CMakeLists.txt
> patch-aux-broctl-etc-broctl.cfg.in applied cleanly.
> *** [do-patch] Error code 1
> 
> Stop in /usr/ports/security/bro.
> build of /usr/ports/security/bro ended at Wed Nov 20 17:54:31 CET 2013
> build time: 00:00:04
> ====>> Error: Build failed in phase: patch
> ====>> Cleaning up
> ====>> Umounting file systems

Remove/delete all current patch files:

    files/patch-CMakeLists.txt
    files/patch-aux-broctl-CMakeLists.txt
    files/patch-aux-broctl-etc-broctl.cfg.in
    files/patch-src-Expr.cc
    files/patch-src-logging-Manager.cc

and then it should build cleanly.

		Craig
